verse_text: Now therefore, I, Nebuchadnezzar, praise, exalt beyond measure, and glorify the King of heaven; because all His works are true, His paths are just, and He is able to humble those who walk in arrogance.

links.context: References to God as King of the heavens include [[DAN.4:37]]; 1Ez 4:46, 58; [[JDT.9:12]]; Tb 13:7, 11.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
